user.title: Solar Forecast Source
user.description: Enter the sensor prefix for your solar forecast sensors. These sensors should have suffixes like _today, _tomorrow, _d2 etc. and provide a 'watts' attribute.

inverter.title: Inverter {inverter_num}
inverter.description: Configure your inverter. Provide at least one control entity (on/off switch or power control number).

data.inverter_power_control_entity: Power control entity (number, for power limiting)

energy_core.title: Energy Core
energy_core.description: Select the Energy Core instance to use.

error.no_control_entity: At least one control entity (on/off or power) is required

abort.energy_core_required: Energy Core integration must be installed and configured first
